channel.title: HoldLens — What to buy (Q4 2025)
channel.description: Top buy signals from the best portfolio managers in the world — ranked on a single signed −100..+100 ConvictionScore where +100 is the strongest possible buy. Updated every 13F filing deadline.

item.title: GE BUY signal · score +42 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Chris Hohn is buying GE (GE Aerospace) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: +42 (positive = buy, negative = sell). Quality-weighted buyer list: Chris Hohn (Q8.2).

item.title: BABA BUY signal · score +40 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: David Tepper, Michael Burry are buying BABA (Alibaba) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: +40 (positive = buy, negative = sell). Quality-weighted buyer list: David Tepper (Q7.6), Michael Burry (Q4.6).

item.title: OXY BUY signal · score +32 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Prem Watsa, Warren Buffett are buying OXY (Occidental Petroleum) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: +32 (positive = buy, negative = sell). Quality-weighted buyer list: Prem Watsa (Q6.9), Warren Buffett (Q5.9).

item.title: META BUY signal · score +20 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: John Armitage, Li Lu, François Rochon, Andreas Halvorsen, Jeffrey Ubben, Chase Coleman, Stephen Mandel, Joel Greenblatt, Lee Ainslie are buying META (Meta Platforms) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: +20 (positive = buy, negative = sell). Quality-weighted buyer list: John Armitage (Q4.9), Li Lu (Q4.5), François Rochon (Q4.5), Andreas Halvorsen (Q4.2), Jeffrey Ubben (Q3.4), Chase Coleman (Q3.3), Stephen Mandel (Q2.5), Joel Greenblatt (Q2.2), Lee Ainslie (Q1).
